instruction: Implement rle(s): run-length-encode a string as consecutive (char, count) pairs concatenated, e.g. rle('aaabbc') == 'a3b2c1', rle('') == '', rle('x') == 'x1'.

files.test_rle.py:
from rle import rle


def test_rle():
    assert rle("aaabbc") == "a3b2c1"
    assert rle("") == ""
    assert rle("x") == "x1"
